scene: المنتج الحقيقي على سطح تراثي سعودي (خشب/نحاس/سدو)، إضاءة دافئة، بدون أشخاص — سليق · The surface is a traditional Najdi heritage table setting, featuring a sadu weave with intricate red, black, and cream patterns, providing a warm and authentic Saudi cultural backdrop. · A single white rigid paper/kraft cup filled with creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, topped with glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the porridge surface. · props: The cream-and-gold eight-point-star lid is placed slightly ajar next to the cup, showing the brand's identity. A wisp of steam rises subtly from the porridge to indicate warmth and freshness. · composition: The cup is centered in the frame, with the lid slightly to the side. The chili pepper garnish is prominently placed on top of the porridge, adding a pop of color. The sadu weave fills the background, emphasizing the cultural context without distracting from the hero product. · light: Warm, golden directional light from one side creates soft-edged shadows and highlights the glossy rivulets of oil on the porridge surface. The lighting mimics a natural, inviting table setting, enhancing the texture and warmth of the dish. · mood: The mood is warm, intimate, and appetizing, with a celebratory tone that invites the viewer to enjoy a traditional Najdi meal. The setting and lighting create a cozy, homely feel, reminiscent of a family gathering.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, placement and composition open]
The reference image teaches the سليق brand identity. Identity is invariant — heritage surface, light angle, and placement are creative decisions.
Identity DNA: A soft, creamy white rice dish — short rice slow-simmered in milk and meat broth until it turns soupy and pudding-soft, pale ivory and almost porridge-like — mounded in a white kraft cup or family tray and topped with a piece of tender stewed lamb or chicken, often finished with a glossy ghee drizzle.
INTEGRATION: The product on heritage stone is one golden-hour moment. The warm stone reflects subtle color onto the product's base — the brand color rhymes warmly with the stone; the long stone-shadow is the same shadow dropping from the product; fine desert particles drift across stone and product alike.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth heritage cinema, photoreal, warm-toned film, warm grain in shadow. Real stone truth — mudbrick straw inclusions, sandstone striations, coral-stone fossil character, weathered wood grain. Material truth: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot; served in ceramic or a foil tray with its own true finish; NEVER a fried crust, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: Very soft, creamy, almost soupy — moist and spoonable, not dry or separate-grain.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
a single-serve bowl/cup ≈9–11cm, or a family foil tray ≈22–26cm; scale-anchored to a serving spoon beside it — honest portion scale. Render the product-to-companion proportion honestly; both small on the heritage surface.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Medium-close proximity — product and companion on the stone fill the frame, the surface texture filling the surround, edges soft. No vast dead space.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived earth]
Warm earth field from Saudi heritage stone (mudbrick beige, sandstone honey, coral-stone rose, AlUla red-earth, weathered-wood brown — authentic earth tones, not borrowed candy accents). Anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. rhyming with the warm tones. Field per Three brand-owned fields ONLY, all evidenced from the real packaging/identity: (1) deep crimson oxblood red (the signature gift-box red) ~#9E1B1B–#7E1414; (2) warm gold / mustard-yellow (the eight-point-star lid label + gold serving pot + 'أطلب الان' CTA) ~#C9971F–#E0B23A; (3) cream / ivory off-white (the kraft cup body + star-label field + lower CTA band) ~#F3EAD7. A color-blocking chain fills the frame with crimson, gold, or cream — and pops via their mutual contrast (crimson↔cream, gold↔crimson). EXCLUDE: blue, the carpet's indigo, terracotta-as-field (terracotta is a companion/apron color, not a fill field), and any borrowed reference red/orange. + real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces.

[LIGHT & LENS · golden-hour hard rake, mood not spec]
Saudi golden-hour directional rake — hard quality catching stone texture, long shadows revealing depth. The shadow can cut across the frame for drama. Background falls into warm shade. Model chooses rake direction (upper-left/right, near-frontal, low-side shadow-emphasis). POPPING COLOR INTENT: warm earth field at full natural depth, Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. as the modern accent rhyming with the honey tones. Lens: portrait compression; model chooses depth for surface vs context.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product and companion came to rest on the stone naturally — product may lie, lean, or stand; companion set down. Not posed in a grid.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS · restrained]
ONE hero companion from the dish in its real serving vessel, a serving spoon, dates or laban on the side (e.g. a serving cup with steam). Optionally one clean shape only if it stays minimal. No scatter.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): المنتج الحقيقي على سطح تراثي سعودي (خشب/نحاس/سدو)، إضاءة دافئة، بدون أشخاص — سليق · The surface is a traditional Najdi heritage table setting, featuring a sadu weave with intricate red, black, and cream patterns, providing a warm and authentic Saudi cultural backdrop. · A single white rigid paper/kraft cup filled with creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, topped with glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the porridge surface. · props: The cream-and-gold eight-point-star lid is placed slightly ajar next to the cup, showing the brand's identity. A wisp of steam rises subtly from the porridge to indicate warmth and freshness. · composition: The cup is centered in the frame, with the lid slightly to the side. The chili pepper garnish is prominently placed on top of the porridge, adding a pop of color. The sadu weave fills the background, emphasizing the cultural context without distracting from the hero product. · light: Warm, golden directional light from one side creates soft-edged shadows and highlights the glossy rivulets of oil on the porridge surface. The lighting mimics a natural, inviting table setting, enhancing the texture and warmth of the dish. · mood: The mood is warm, intimate, and appetizing, with a celebratory tone that invites the viewer to enjoy a traditional Najdi meal. The setting and lighting create a cozy, homely feel, reminiscent of a family gathering.
Heritage textural placement — the product on identifiably Saudi heritage material, rooted in place and time. Model chooses: surface (Diriyah mudbrick, Najdi sandstone, Hejazi coral-stone, weathered wood, AlUla rock); placement (centered, off-centered rule-of-thirds, near a corner); light angle; architectural anchor (subtle Najdi carving at edge, mudbrick joint, coral fossil, or pure texture); frame depth.

[SUBJECT]
Authentic Saudi material truth per CS-13 — specifically Diriyah/Najdi/Hejazi/AlUla, not generic Middle Eastern. Honest, scale-correct texture. The product is the modern note against heritage stone.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product. ONE companion. Only heritage surface — no other props, no humans. Specifically Saudi per CS-13. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal heritage commercial photography. Warm earth-tone grade, Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. sharp. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian maps the surface to brand region per CS-13 (Najdi sandstone for Riyadh, Hejazi coral-stone for Jeddah, Diriyah mudbrick for national-heritage, AlUla rock for premium). real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies the companion. Founding/National Day heritage emphasis.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary surface, placement, golden-hour angle, architectural anchor, frame depth. Hold constant: golden-hour hard rake, brand-derived earth field, one companion, honest proportion, material texture. Each render a different heritage moment.
